name: König (General Use)
description:
This is a general-use bot that is designed to run with any roleplay plot. Have fun with it.

This and the König bot are my first bots, please be easy with me. I will check back occasionally to update it and keep it running so please leave comments and public chats so I can diagnose any problems with the bot!
